title: nicotiana viscosa var. dilatata
intro: Nicotiana viscosa var. dilatata, also known as the sticky tobacco or tree tobacco, is a variety of the Nicotiana viscosa plant, a flowering plant in the nightshade family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Nicotiana viscosa var. dilatata include soothing coughs, relieving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal uses, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic purposes.
